title: elymus × drucei
intro: Elymus × drucei, also known as Druce's wheat-grass or a hybrid of Elymus caninus and Elymus junceus, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to promote digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). The health benefits of Elymus × drucei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Elymus × drucei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
